name: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal
overview: When aspiring duelist Yuma meets Astral, a mysterious visitor from another universe, it seems like destiny. Yuma needs Astral to teach him how to duel, and Astral needs Yuma to help him regain his memories!

trailers.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL Season 1 Opening Theme "Take A Chance"
